(wasting).
  1. Son of Abishua and father of Uzzi fifth from Aaron in the line of the high priests in (1�Chronicles 6:5; 6:5,51) (Authorized Version), and in the genealogy of Ezra. (Ezra 7:4)
  2. Son of Jogli, prince of the tribe of Dan, one of the ten men chosen to apportion the land of Canaan between the tribes. (Numbers 34:22)
